exerciseSchema.description: Complete exercise template with all 29 fields

example.name: Push-Up
coachingCues: Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels
Lower your body until your chest nearly touches the floor
Push through your palms to return to starting position
Keep your core tight throughout the movement
commonMistakes: Sagging hips — keep the body rigid
Flaring elbows too wide — keep elbows at 45 degrees
Incomplete range of motion — go low enough to challenge yourself
Holding your breath — breathe out as you push up
setupInstructions: Start in a plank position with hands shoulder-width apart
Keep feet together or slightly apart for stability
executionSteps: Lower your body in one straight line
Chest should nearly touch the floor at the bottom
Push through your palms to drive back up
Return to starting position without locking elbows

shoulder_injury.note: Risk of further shoulder strain with loaded pressing

wrist_pain.note: Use neutral grip push-up or fists instead of open palms

elbow_injury.note: Reduce range of motion to avoid full extension

fieldDescriptions.name: Display name of the exercise
fieldDescriptions.aliases: Alternative names users might search for
fieldDescriptions.primaryMuscles: Array of primary muscle group IDs
fieldDescriptions.secondaryMuscles: Array of supporting muscle group IDs
fieldDescriptions.requiredEquipment: Array of equipment IDs that are mandatory
fieldDescriptions.optionalEquipment: Array of equipment that can be substituted
fieldDescriptions.isUnilateral: Boolean — true if exercise is single-sided
fieldDescriptions.isTimeBased: Boolean — true if exercise uses duration instead of reps
fieldDescriptions.goalsSupported: Array of goals this exercise supports
fieldDescriptions.estimatedDurationSeconds: How long one set typically takes
fieldDescriptions.defaultPrescription: Sets, reps, rest, tempo for each difficulty level
fieldDescriptions.coachingCues: 2-4 form cues to teach proper execution
fieldDescriptions.contraindications: Mapping of injury types to severity and modifications
fieldDescriptions.regressionId: ID of easier exercise in progression chain
fieldDescriptions.progressionId: ID of harder exercise in progression chain
fieldDescriptions.warmupCompatible: Can this be used as a warm-up?
fieldDescriptions.cooldownCompatible: Can this be used as a cool-down?
fieldDescriptions.mainLiftCompatible: Is this suitable as a main compound lift?
fieldDescriptions.animation: Object containing animation asset paths and metadata
